bibliography.title: Experimental analysis of contact forces between strands in three-strand ropes with varying twist parameters and filament counts

evidence: The official University of Twente landing page labels the final published version 'Licence: CC BY'.
The landing-page license link resolves to the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 deed.
The first page of the official final PDF displays the Creative Commons Attribution mark.

manual_review.text_extraction: Page-separated pdftotext extraction reviewed for all pages.
manual_review.rendering: All 17 pages rendered at 150 pixels per inch.
manual_review.visual_audit: Every page visually inspected; every claim-bearing page re-inspected at full rendered resolution.
manual_review.automation_policy: Automated extraction was used only to aid navigation. Corpus prose and page dispositions were written manually after source review.

source_file_policy: The PDF is not copied into the repository. Official URL and cryptographic checksums identify the reviewed object.
